evals.prompt: Parity check is failing. Can you figure out what's wrong and fix it?
evals.expected_output: Runs all 4 parity gates, parses failures, categorizes drift by type, identifies root cause with file paths, and suggests specific fixes.

expectations.name: runs-all-parity-gates
expectations.assertion: Output shows execution of pnpm check:standalone, check:module-parity, check:passthrough-parity, and check:workouts-parity

expectations.name: categorizes-failures
expectations.assertion: Each failure is categorized as one of: route-mismatch, data-model-drift, ui-divergence, api-contract-break, passthrough-break, or config-drift

expectations.name: identifies-file-pairs
expectations.assertion: For each failure, output identifies both the standalone file path and the corresponding hub file path

expectations.name: suggests-concrete-fix
expectations.assertion: Each failure includes a specific fix description with the file to edit and what change to make

evals.prompt: The passthrough parity check fails on MyWords. Debug and remediate.
evals.expected_output: Identifies which web route wrappers in apps/web/app/words/ are missing or incorrectly importing from the standalone alias.

expectations.name: scopes-to-module
expectations.assertion: Analysis is scoped to the words module, examining apps/web/app/words/ routes and MyWords standalone routes

expectations.name: checks-alias-imports
expectations.assertion: Output verifies whether web wrapper files correctly import from the @mywords-web alias or equivalent standalone path

evals.prompt: All parity gates are passing, but I want to make sure nothing is silently drifting. Run a deep parity audit.
evals.expected_output: Runs all gates, confirms they pass, then does deeper analysis comparing exports and schemas between standalone and hub for each module.

expectations.name: confirms-gates-pass
expectations.assertion: Output clearly states all 4 parity gates pass before proceeding to deeper analysis

expectations.name: goes-beyond-gates
expectations.assertion: Output analyzes at least one additional dimension beyond the 4 standard gates, such as comparing exported types or schema shapes
